---
name: landing-page-proof-stack
description: Use after ad generation to create a landing page proof path that continues the ad promise.
---
# Landing Page Proof Stack

## Required sections

1. Promise and buyer state.
2. Product mechanism.
3. Demo or screenshot.
4. Proof cluster.
5. Objection answers.
6. Pricing or next-step clarity.
7. CTA.

## Output

```markdown
# Landing Page Proof Stack

## Hero
## Mechanism
## Demo
## Proof
## Objections
## Offer
## CTA
## Missing assets
```
